name: Withanolides
summary: Withanolides are steroidal lactones associated with ashwagandha extracts; human attribution is indirect because clinical studies usually test whole extracts.
description: Steroidal lactone class from Withania somnifera; proposed effects include HPA-axis, GABAergic, and inflammatory signaling modulation, with most mechanism evidence preclinical.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
